name: Data question
about: Ask a question about the dataset schema, contents, or methodology

**Your question**
A clear description of what you would like to understand.

**Which part of the dataset does this relate to?**
- [ ] PR table (`agenticflict_pr`)
- [ ] Conflict files table (`agenticflict_conflict_files`)
- [ ] Regions table (`agenticflict_regions`)
- [ ] Repository table (`agenticflict_repo`)
- [ ] Commit attribution table (`agenticflict_conflict_file_commits`)
- [ ] Methodology / extraction pipeline
- [ ] Other

**What have you already tried or checked?**
e.g. README, paper, data dictionary, documentation at https://agenticflict.readthedocs.io/
